message:
refactor(sql): extract result_ops.zig from executor

Extracted DISTINCT, ORDER BY, and LIMIT/OFFSET operations into
standalone result_ops.zig module using composition pattern.

Functions now receive explicit allocator parameter instead of
accessing self.*, enabling independent testing and reuse.

- executor.zig: 4,122 → 3,741 lines (-381)
- result_ops.zig: 361 lines (new)
